name: ULTRA CREDIT SOLUTIONS-CREDIT REPAIR AND DEBT SETTLEMENT
description_short: ULTRA CREDIT SOLUTIONS-CREDIT REPAIR AND DEBT SETTLEMENT is a credit repair provider based in Jackson Heights, New York. Rated 5.0/5 with 263 Google reviews, reflecting exceptional customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Ultra Credit Solutions is a locally operated credit repair and debt settlement firm based in Jackson Heights, Queens, New York. Founded to serve consumers who feel overwhelmed by damaged credit histories, the company offers in-person, one-on-one consultations from its suite on 73rd Street — a differentiator in an industry dominated by remote-only services. The firm's team describes itself as diverse and community-oriented, which likely resonates with Jackson Heights' multicultural population. They report a 96% customer satisfaction rate and cite individual client outcomes including credit score recoveries from below 500 to above 700.

The company's core services span two main tracks: credit repair and debt settlement. On the credit repair side, they dispute inaccurate and unverifiable items directly with the three major credit bureaus, covering everything from collection accounts and public records to hard inquiries and identity theft entries. On the debt side, they negotiate directly with creditors to reduce outstanding balances. Two service tiers are published on their website: a Basic plan at $299/month and a Gold plan at $450/month, both with additional per-deletion fees that vary by item type — for example, $50 per inquiry removed and $75 per collection deleted. The Gold plan includes direct handling by the owner, which may appeal to clients with more complex files.

Consumers considering Ultra Credit Solutions should understand a few things before signing on. First, the hybrid pricing model — monthly retainer plus per-deletion fees — means total costs can be difficult to predict upfront. A consumer with multiple derogatory items could see fees compound quickly beyond the base monthly rate. Second, like all credit repair services, results depend heavily on whether disputed items are genuinely inaccurate or unverifiable; legitimate negative information cannot legally be permanently removed. Third, debt settlement carries its own risks, including potential tax liability on forgiven debt and temporary credit score impact during the negotiation period. Consumers should request a written contract and review it against the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA) before making any payment.

Ultra Credit Solutions holds a strong Google reputation — a 5.0 rating across 263 reviews is notable and suggests consistent client experiences. The in-person service model is a genuine advantage for New York City residents who prefer face-to-face accountability. That said, the firm is a small local operation with no independently verifiable industry certifications or regulatory track record listed publicly. Prospective clients should verify the company's standing with the New York Department of Financial Services, request references, and compare total projected costs — not just the headline monthly fee — against alternatives before committing.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 5.0/5 Google rating across 263 reviews indicates strong and consistent client satisfaction
In-person consultations available at their Jackson Heights office — uncommon in credit repair
Transparent, published pricing with two service tiers so clients know the structure upfront
Handles both credit repair and debt settlement, covering the full spectrum of credit recovery needs
Gold plan includes direct owner involvement, offering a higher-touch option for complex cases
Serves a diverse, multilingual community in Queens — likely offers culturally competent service
cons: Per-deletion fees stacked on top of monthly retainers ($299–$450/month) make total costs unpredictable and potentially high
Small local firm with no publicly listed industry certifications (e.g., NACSO, FICO certification) to verify expertise
Website shows inconsistent client volume claims ('100+ happy clients' in one section, '1000+ satisfied customers' in another), which warrants scrutiny
Debt settlement services can negatively impact credit scores during the negotiation period — this trade-off is not prominently disclosed
No clear information on contract length, cancellation terms, or refund policy published on the site
best_for: Consumers in Jackson Heights, New York looking for credit repair services
People who prefer working with a local credit repair provider
Individuals with negative items on their credit reports
People preparing for major purchases like home or car buying
diagnosis: Ultra Credit Solutions is best suited for New York City residents — particularly in the Queens area — who want hands-on, in-person credit repair support and may also carry significant unsecured debt that could benefit from settlement negotiation. The main caveat is the layered fee structure: consumers with many derogatory items should model out total expected costs before signing, as per-deletion charges can substantially exceed the monthly base rate.
services: Credit bureau dispute filing (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion)
Removal of inaccurate or unverifiable collection accounts
Public records dispute (judgments, tax liens, bankruptcies)
Identity theft resolution and fraudulent account removal
Personal information correction on credit reports
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
